name: betterproto (Modern Python Protobuf Library)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); danielgtaylor / Daniel G. Taylor

performance.notes: Pure Python serialization; slower than C++ protobuf but more Pythonic

agent_readiness.notes: Modern dataclass-based Protobuf for Python. Generates clean Python dataclasses from .proto files. protoc --python_betterproto_out=. *.proto (with grpc_tools). @dataclass class SearchRequest(betterproto.Message): query: str = betterproto.string_field(1); page_number: int = betterproto.int32_field(2). data = SearchRequest(query='cat', page_number=1). bytes = bytes(data). request = SearchRequest().parse(bytes). to_dict(): {'query': 'cat', 'page_number': 1}. from_dict({'query': 'cat'}). gRPC: stub = SearchStub(channel); async response = stub.search(SearchRequest(query='cat')). Async gRPC with asyncio. Better than google-protobuf: no Descriptor magic, pure dataclasses, proper Python typing, snake_case field names. JSON serialization built-in.

gotchas: v2 (betterproto2) is a rewrite — different from v1 api in some areas
Slower than google-protobuf's C extension for high-throughput
Custom protoc plugin required (not standard protoc output)
best_when: Python gRPC services wanting idiomatic dataclass-based Protobuf
When google-protobuf's generated code is too verbose/magical
Async gRPC Python services with asyncio
Teams preferring clean Python dataclasses over Protobuf message objects
avoid_when: Interoperability with other google-protobuf features (custom options, etc.)
Teams already standardized on official grpcio
summary: betterproto generates clean Python dataclasses from .proto files. @dataclass class Msg(betterproto.Message): field: str = betterproto.string_field(1). bytes(msg) to serialize; Msg().parse(bytes). to_dict()/from_dict() for JSON. Async gRPC stubs. MIT. Pure Python (slower than C ext). Better ergonomics than official google-protobuf. v2 (betterproto2) is rewrite. Best for async Python gRPC services wanting idiomatic dataclasses.
